content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 2, 1), (3, 7, 3), (3, 5, 4), (4, 8, 5), (1, 9, 9), (1, 5, 10), (6, 7, 10), (5, 9, 11), (6, 8, 14), (2, 4, 21), (2, 3, 22), (1, 4, 26)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 4.

* Edge (1, 2, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (3, 7, 3) has node 3 and time 3. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 5, 4) has node 3 and time 4. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 8, 5) has node 4 and time 5. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 9, 9) has node 1 and time 9. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 5, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 7, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 9, 11) has node 5 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 8, 14) has node 6 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 4, 21) has node 2 and time 21. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 3, 22) has node 2 and time 22. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 4, 26) has node 1 and time 26. -> Add node 4.

The nodes matched are 5, 7, 8, and 9.

Answer: [5, 7, 8, 9]
